title: Dolomiaea souliei
taxonomy: Dolomiaea souliei is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Dolomiaea, which is a group of plants that are closely related to the genus Cremanium. Dolomiaea souliei is native to China, specifically in the provinces of Yunnan and Sichuan. Within the Asteraceae family, Dolomiaea souliei is part of the subfamily Carduoideae. Further classification may be available within the subfamily.
